# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Write secure code.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# Kong configuration file

# Upstream services
upstreams:
  - name: "microservice1"
    url: "http://localhost:8081"
  - name: "microservice2"
    url: "http://localhost:8082"

# Routes
routes:
  - name: "api-route"
    paths: ["/api/*"]
    methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstream_url: "http://microservice1"
  - name: "admin-route"
    paths: ["/admin/*"]
    methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    upstream_url: "http://microservice2"

# Plugins
plugins:
  - name: "cors"
    enabled: true
    config:
      origin: ["*"]
      methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
      headers: ["Content-Type", "Authorization"]
      credentials: false
      max_age: 3600
  - name: "rate-limiting"
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 100
      hour: 500
      day: 1000
